title: rubus rivularis var. degenianus
intro: Rubus rivularis var. degenianus, also known as a type of wild raspberry or a variety of the Himalayan raspberry, is a plant species within the Rosaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus rivularis var. degenianus include its potential to support cardiovascular health, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Rubus rivularis var. degenianus is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves, stems, and roots in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
